title: from-field relay-set not client-supplied: sender spoofing structurally impossible
description: BROADCAST, WHISPER, GROUP_SEND, TYPING: the 'from' field in all outgoing DeliverParams/WhisperDeliverParams/GroupDeliverParams/TypingNotifyParams is set from the authenticated pub_id (verified via Ed25519 signature) never from client-supplied params. This is a structural property of the relay — a client cannot impersonate another user even if the downstream decryption is broken. Should be preserved; any refactor that pulls 'from' from params would re-enable sender spoofing.
